title: senecio scabrellus
intro: Senecio scabrellus, also known as rough fireweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids, particularly senecionine and senesciphylline, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio scabrellus include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with allergies. Herbal preparations of Senecio scabrellus are often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to the potential toxicity of the plant's alkaloids.
